scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: No hardship was mentioned by the borrower, so there was no hardship detection or offer of a hardship program to evaluate.

scores.name: continuity
scores.reason: The exchange is coherent and concise across stages. Agent_1 appropriately stops after refusal, and agent_2 continues the same closure without unnecessary repetition.

scores.name: resolution_quality
scores.reason: The conversation moves to an appropriate resolution by acknowledging refusal, stopping outreach, and closing the assessment. Agent_2 also satisfies identity disclosure and recording disclosure requirements while respecting the borrower’s request to stop.
